name: Fish & Bubbles
short_description: Purchase fish, feed them to collect coins, upgrade your tank and Zen out in... "Fish & Bubbles"! Updates will be released regularly, stay up to date on our Steam posts, or join our Discord!
detailed_description:
Purchase fish, feed them to collect coins, upgrade your tank and Zen out in... "Fish & Bubbles"!
Upgrade your tank and purchase new fish in the Shop.
Explore the Pond to fish for more fish, and explore secrets there.
Use the Market to list fish to sell, or buy fish from other players.
Updates will be released regularly, stay up to date on our Steam posts, or join our Discord!
about_the_game:
Purchase fish, feed them to collect coins, upgrade your tank and Zen out in... "Fish & Bubbles"!
Upgrade your tank and purchase new fish in the Shop.
Explore the Pond to fish for more fish, and explore secrets there.
Use the Market to list fish to sell, or buy fish from other players.
Updates will be released regularly, stay up to date on our Steam posts, or join our Discord!
